title: [Crafting] Cheaper templates
description: Reduces the number of diamonds needed for smithing template replication from 7 diamonds to 4 diamonds
body:
Copying smithing templates is expensive. This data pack changes the replication recipe to use 4 diamonds instead of 7 and requires 3 more of the related block in their place.

Check out my [Crafting Tweaks collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/VQZNq4ph) for more crafting changes
